display.purpose: Major section headers, one per logical surface.

headline.purpose: Panel section titles, mode name in header.

title.purpose: Card headers, list labels, tab labels — the primary workhorse step.

body.purpose: Message content, briefing text. Cap at 65ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase + 0.18em tracking for system-generated annotations only.

mono.purpose: Code, IDs, latency values, terminal strings only.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: Signature .hud-panel elevation. Outward bloom + inset depth.

shadows.name: core-bloom
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the ArcCore orb only. Never used on panels or cards.

shadows.name: panel-border
shadows.purpose: 1px border glow. The baseline 'surface exists' signal at rest.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for all hover/focus/active state transitions.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Component entrance (fade-up, msg-in). Ease-out only — no bounce.

motion.name: reactor-pulse
motion.purpose: Active mode button breathing glow. Applied via reactor-pulse keyframe.

motion.name: h-scan
motion.purpose: Horizontal scan sweep. Decorative ambient animation at low opacity.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Chat scroll height bump, button padding increase.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Three-column flex layout activates. Mobile drawers hidden.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Side panel width widens from 240px to 270px.

components.name: HUD Panel
components.description: The core container. Every surface in the system lives inside one. Corner brackets are its visual signature.
components.html:
System Status

All systems nominal. Awaiting command.

components.name: Action Button
components.description: Primary interactive button. Armed and waiting — crisp response, 0.2s ease-out.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action within a panel. Transparent at rest, tinted on hover.

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only. Plasma Alert tint signals irreversibility.

components.name: Command Input
components.description: Near-invisible at rest. Full accent border on focus — the border does all the work.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Veronica, deploy coding mode." />

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Horizontal navigation strip inside the ops panel. Active tab uses accent tint. Overflows horizontally on narrow viewports.

components.name: Mode Selector
components.description: Four personality buttons. Active state drives the entire UI color mode and pulses with reactor-pulse.

components.name: Chat Bubbles
components.description: VERONICA replies in accent tint. COMMANDER messages in plasma-alert tint, right-aligned by margin.
components.html:
VERONICA

Reactor online. All systems armed.

COMMANDER

Run diagnostics.

narrative.overview:
VERONICA is hardened kit that happens to be beautiful. Every surface is a control surface. Every glow is functional heat. The interface does not perform futurism — it performs readiness. One operator, one command center, every signal visible at a glance. The aesthetic emerges from purpose: the glow exists because the system is live, not because the designer wanted it to feel futuristic.

The system runs in four modal states — JARVIS (arc-light cyan), FRIDAY (ambercore gold), VERONICA (soft purple), SENTINEL (plasma red) — each representing a distinct cognitive posture. Color is mode signal. The accent at any given moment tells the operator which version of the AI they are addressing and what kind of work they are doing.

Space Grotesk keeps text sharp and legible on dark backgrounds without veering clinical. JetBrains Mono anchors terminal-adjacent surfaces. The pairing reads as precision instrument, not developer tool.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: optimized for a single operator at a monitor in low ambient light
Functional glow: arc-light appears only on active, interactive, or live elements
Four-mode personality: accent shifts with cognitive mode; everything else stays constant
Kinetic precision: motion confirms state changes, it does not choreograph entrances
No hierarchy confusion: scale and weight contrast are the only hierarchy tools

rules.name: The Mode Signal Rule
rules.body: The active modal accent must appear on at most 10% of the screen surface at any time. Its rarity is what makes it readable as a signal.

rules.name: The One Danger Color Rule
rules.body: Plasma Alert (#ff3f81) is reserved strictly for error states, destructive confirmations, and threat alerts. Never decorative.

rules.name: The UPPERCASE Label Rule
rules.body: Labels identifying system state, mode, or category are set in uppercase with letter-spacing: 0.18em. Human-authored content never gets this treatment.

rules.name: The Mono Quarantine Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for machine-generated technical content: code, IDs, latency values, terminal strings. Never for flavor text or timestamps.

rules.name: The Flat Interior Rule
rules.body: Inside a .hud-panel, there is no elevation. Elements within a panel use only background tints and hairline borders. Nested glow compounds into visual noise.

rules.name: The No Layered Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never stack multiple box-shadows to simulate material depth. The only shadows in this system are zero-offset radial blooms.

dos: Do let the modal accent do the elevation work — if an element is live or active, the accent border signals it
Do use uppercase + tracking (0.18em) for all system-generated labels only
Do keep glow at the panel perimeter only — the interior of every .hud-panel is flat
Do add break-words min-w-0 to any text inside a flex container
Do add shrink-0 to timestamps, dates, and icon buttons in flex rows
Do use ease-out (0.2s–0.4s) for all state transitions
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill)
Don't add glassmorphism decoratively — backdrop-filter is structural on .hud-panel only
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items
Don't build gradient hero metrics: big number, small label, gradient accent bar
Don't apply the modal accent to static non-interactive elements at rest
Don't use JetBrains Mono for flavor text, timestamps, or decorative copy
Don't make it feel like a 2024 AI SaaS product: no purple gradient hero sections, no glassmorphism sidebar, no onboarding toasts
